headline: P&L exposure: ₹24.0 Cr direct demand + ₹13.6 Cr credit/valuation transmission (low confidence)
what_matters: P/E multiple may see slight expansion, but for a large cap, impact is limited (0.0-0.1x); margin erosion unlikely, with 5.3 bps margin improvement instead.
Potential for marginally lower cost of capital due to improved outlook; bond spread tightening possible but limited to ₹24.0 Cr direct quantum.
No supply chain transmission; event is driven by direct operational demand, not upstream or downstream effects.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹24.0 Cr direct demand + ₹13.6 Cr credit/valuation transmission (low confidence)
Revenue at risk: No revenue at risk; event is positive for revenue
